name: Chocolate Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Taste of Home Magazine, June/July 1996, Mary Pulyer
Preparation Time: 1:00
1. In a mixing bowl, beat the cake mix, eggs, and oil (batter will be very stiff).
2. Stir in the peanut butter chips.
3. Roll the mixture into 1-inch balls.
4. Place the balls on lightly greased baking sheets and flatten slightly.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 10 minutes or until a slight indentation remains when lightly touched.
6. Cool for 2 minutes before removing to a wire rack.
